CheckTitle: Ensure guest users are covered by risk-based Conditional Access policies
Description: Checks whether risk-based Conditional Access policies (sign-in risk or user risk) include guest users in their scope. Guest accounts are frequent targets for credential stuffing and should be protected by risk-based policies.
Risk: Guest accounts are often overlooked in Conditional Access targeting. Without risk-based CA coverage, a compromised guest account will not trigger risk-based blocks or MFA challenges, allowing attackers to operate undetected.

Remediation.Recommendation: Ensure Conditional Access policies with sign-in risk or user risk conditions target 'All users' or explicitly include 'GuestsOrExternalUsers'. Do not exclude guest users from risk-based policies.

SourceNotes: Risk-based policies require Entra ID P2. Guest coverage is a common gap.
